creator: ahmadkhalifa570@gmail.com
text:
I can reproduce this consistently with full dumps with gdb 15.1_2. minidumps seem to work fine*.

The dumps were taken on 14.2-RELEASE-p3.

I did some digging and found some differences when using kgdb with a full dump vs a minidump. (Though full dump vs minidump isn't necessary the issue here, I've had this happen at least once with a minidump)

With a full dump:
parse_and_eval_address("msgbufp") returns 0, so trying to do things like msgbufp->msg_ptr (which is done when trying to print the dmesg output) causes an exception.
parse_and_eval_long("dumptid") also returns 0. When the tid is given to kgdb_thr_lookup_tid, it ends up returning null; weirdly enough, at this point the global "first" is also null. -- This eventually leads to the call to switch_to_thread with a null pointer, which causes the assertion failure.

With a minidump:
parse_and_eval_address("msgbufp") returns 0xFFFFF8083F2FFFB8
parse_and_eval_long("dumptid") returns 102326

The values seem sane. This time when kgdb_thr_lookup_tid is called, "first" is non-null and gdb goes on just fine without an assertion failure.

I'll also provide a backtrace of the failure here, in case it is of any help.

#0  switch_to_thread (thr=thr@entry=0x0) at /usr/ports/devel/gdb/work-py311/gdb-15.1/gdb/thread.c:1423
#1  0x00000000007bad32 in fbsd_kvm_target_open (args=args@entry=0x803aa638e "/var/crash/vmcore.0", from_tty=from_tty@entry=1) at /usr/ports/devel/gdb/work-py311/gdb-15.1/gdb/fbsd-kvm.c:417
#2  0x0000000000a8ffbe in open_target (args=0x803aa638e "/var/crash/vmcore.0", from_tty=1, command=<optimized out>) at /usr/ports/devel/gdb/work-py311/gdb-15.1/gdb/target.c:837
#3  0x00000000006b988b in cmd_func (cmd=0x0, cmd@entry=0x803b1e640, args=0x0, args@entry=0x803aa638e "/var/crash/vmcore.0", from_tty=60822272, from_tty@entry=1) at /usr/ports/devel/gdb/work-py311/gdb-15.1/gdb/cli/cli-decode.c:2741
#4  0x0000000000ac6b35 in execute_command (p=<optimized out>, from_tty=1) at /usr/ports/devel/gdb/work-py311/gdb-15.1/gdb/top.c:569
#5  0x00000000008870b9 in catch_command_errors (arg=0x0, do_bp_actions=true, command=<optimized out>, from_tty=<optimized out>) at /usr/ports/devel/gdb/work-py311/gdb-15.1/gdb/main.c:506
#6  execute_cmdargs (cmdarg_vec=cmdarg_vec@entry=0x7fffffffd730, file_type=file_type@entry=CMDARG_FILE, cmd_type=cmd_type@entry=CMDARG_COMMAND, ret=ret@entry=0x7fffffffd70c) at /usr/ports/devel/gdb/work-py311/gdb-15.1/gdb/main.c:605
#7  0x00000000008856e5 in captured_main_1 (context=context@entry=0x7fffffffc9e0) at /usr/ports/devel/gdb/work-py311/gdb-15.1/gdb/main.c:1302
#8  0x0000000000883ebc in captured_main (data=0x0) at /usr/ports/devel/gdb/work-py311/gdb-15.1/gdb/main.c:1327
#9  gdb_main (args=0x0) at /usr/ports/devel/gdb/work-py311/gdb-15.1/gdb/main.c:1356
#10 0x000000000059a7a7 in main (argc=<optimized out>, argv=<optimized out>) at /usr/ports/devel/gdb/work-py311/gdb-15.1/gdb/kgdb-main.c:375
